description: Tabbed activity panel that combines TmActivityTimeline, TmActivityComments, and TmActivityAttachments into a single component with switchable tabs. Each tab can be shown or hidden independently. Tab badges display item counts.

examples.title: Full activity log with all tabs
examples.code:
<TmActivityLog EntityId="@entityId"
               TimelineEntries="@timelineEntries"
               Comments="@comments"
               Attachments="@attachments"
               AttachmentProvider="@attachmentProvider"
               OnCommentAdded="HandleCommentAdded"
               OnCommentDeleted="HandleCommentDeleted" />
